name: @almirant/feedback-widget
description: Universal feedback widget for Almirant - vanilla JS, no framework dependencies

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.mjs --format esm --target browser && bun build src/iife-entry.ts --outfile dist/feedback-widget.iife.js --format iife --target browser && tsc --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
